Object# SubscriptionAvailabilityCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.Subscription.Data

App Store Connect API 2.3+

```
object SubscriptionAvailabilityCreateRequest.Data.Relationships.Subscription.Data
```

## [Properties](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/subscriptionavailabilitycreaterequest/data-data.dictionary/relationships-data.dictionary/subscription-data.dictionary/data-data.dictionary#properties)

`id``string` (Required) An opaque resource ID that uniquely identifies the resource. Obtain the subscription resource ID from the [`List All Subscriptions for a Subscription Group`](/documentation/appstoreconnectapi/get-v1-subscriptiongroups-_id_-subscriptions) response.

`type``string` (Required) 

 Value: `subscriptions`
